doc_001_vendor_contract.docx.summary: This document is a Master Services Agreement between Acme Corporation and CloudBase Inc., effective from March 1, 2024, to February 28, 2025. The contract involves an annual subscription fee of $120,000 USD, payable quarterly at $30,000 per quarter, with invoices due within 30 days. The agreement includes automatic renewal for one-year periods unless terminated with a 45-day notice, and it is governed by Delaware law with disputes resolved through arbitration in New York.

doc_002_support_ticket.pdf.summary: This document is a support ticket submitted by Priya Mehta from Acme Corporation on July 15, 2024, regarding a critical access issue with the Oracle Financials ERP system. The issue, which prevented Priya and three other team members from logging in and processing over 200 vendor invoices totaling approximately ₹1.8 crore, was resolved by the Platform Engineering Team in 1 hour and 33 minutes. The root cause was identified as a failed Oracle LDAP connector sync job after an Active Directory password rotation, and the issue was resolved by manually re-triggering the LDAP sync.

doc_003_statement_of_work.docx.summary: The document is a Statement of Work (SOW) for the "Intelligent Document Processing Automation" project between NovaBridge Financial Services Pvt. Ltd. and Ententia AI Solutions Pvt. Ltd. The project, with a total budget of ₹40,00,000, is scheduled to start on September 20, 2024, and end on February 7, 2025. Key deliverables include a document ingestion pipeline, classification engine, and integration API, with payment milestones tied to specific deliverables throughout the project timeline.

doc_004_invoice.pdf.summary: This document is an invoice from ENTENTIA AI SOLUTIONS PVT. LTD. to NovaBridge Financial Services Pvt. Ltd., dated October 28, 2024, with a due date of November 27, 2024. The invoice, numbered ENT-INV-2024-0043, totals ₹14,16,000, including GST, for services such as the delivery of a document ingestion pipeline, additional data annotation, and cloud infrastructure setup. Payment is to be made to HDFC Bank Ltd., with specific account details provided.
